race.comment: HOLDING CAPTIVE (6) is a gelding by Zousain on debut for the Ciaron Maher who has had plenty of trial experience leading in, winning his latest impressively at Caulfield Heath. He draws ideally and looks ready to win first time out. FIVEMINUTEWARNING (5) is a gelding by Time Test on debut for the Payne yard. As is typical for the yard, he's had a plethora of trials and jumpouts, coming away to win his latest at Kilmore nicely. Go close. MELEYS (11) resumes for her second campaign having shown ability last time in. She can be an improver this time in and Lane booked is a good lead. VORONYA (9) has been okay in two runs to date, and can continue to progress.
